name: Seaside Cottage
description: A charming overwater bungalow with direct lagoon access and stunning sunset views.

name: Mountain Lodge
description: A cozy timber lodge nestled in the Alps, perfect for skiing in winter and hiking in summer.

name: City Apartment
description: A stylish Haussmann-era apartment in the heart of Le Marais, walking distance from major sights.

name: Desert Resort Villa
description: A luxury private villa surrounded by golden dunes, with a personal butler and infinity pool.

name: Jungle Retreat
description: An eco-lodge deep in the rainforest canopy, with wildlife tours and sustainable living.
